description: Paired C0-C3 20-percent-off coupon experiment at the confirmed 36-vehicle A1 nine-zone mechanism baseline.

coupon_experiment.interpretation: Finite daily 20-percent-off coupon mechanism assumptions, not observed Shanghai take-up or welfare estimates.

scope_notes: All policies within a seed share Agents, activities, OD, weather, 36-vehicle pool, A1 choice behavior, mode-choice shocks and base dispatch priorities.
C0 has no coupon; C1 is limited all-age public claiming; C2 is limited elder-targeted distribution; C3 uses 70 percent public and 30 percent elder-reserved coupons.
A coupon binds to the first ride-hailing request; success redeems it and failure expires it for that modeled day-weather run.
C3 community or phone assistance covers only a configured fraction of otherwise unassisted elders and does not change digital_access.
The 40-coupon pool is a proportional mechanism setting, not a recommended real-world coverage rate.
